title: Lead Frontend Developer at Byju's International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Lead Frontend Developer at Byju's International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
Byju's International Enterprises has an exciting opening for a Frontend Developer at our Varanasi office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Byju's International Enterprises:
Byju's International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Python

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Byju's International Enterprises!
